props.name: animated
props.description: Use to animate the stripes right to left via CSS3 animations.

props.name: color
props.description: Sets the color context of the component to one of CoreUI’s themed colors.

props.name: height
props.description: Sets the height of the component. If you set that value the inner `<CProgressBar>` will automatically resize accordingly.

props.name: progressBarClassName
props.description: A string of all className you want applied to the <CProgressBar/> component.

props.name: value
props.description: The percent to progress the ProgressBar.

props.name: variant
props.description: Set the progress bar variant to optional striped.

props.name: white
props.description: Change the default color to white.
